classification_boundary.public_surface_rule: reviewed root allowlist, docs/protocols/scripts prefixes, Cargo manifests, Rust lib/bin entry points, and experiment package/CLI entry points
classification_boundary.purpose: deterministic review prioritization only; flags do not establish review or risk
classification_boundary.science_sensitive_rule: reviewed root allowlist, experiments/protocols/power-gate prefixes, and attribution/H1/H2/offline/PID/power/preregistration path tokens
classification_boundary.security_sensitive_rule: reviewed root allowlist, workflow/NCP/SAFE prefixes, and audit/bridge/holdout/manifest/observer/replay/runlog/security/verify path tokens

line_count_semantics: LF byte count plus one for a nonempty blob without a terminal LF; reported for binary blobs as byte framing, not source lines

review.claim: No file-review completion is asserted by this baseline inventory.

source.inventory_source: git ls-tree -r -z plus git cat-file blob
